utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details and costs: 1) health_coverage: explicitly splits physical and mental, includes named plans, monthly costs, and a total health cost—fully specified with costs. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance plan name, monthly cost, and total property cost—fully specified with costs. 3) travel_coverage: includes plan name, monthly cost, and total travel cost—fully specified with costs. 4) additional_services: lists multiple enhancement services with names, monthly costs, identifiers, and a total additional cost—fully specified with costs. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual totals and savings—fully specified. All requested items are included and detailed with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item named in the final coverage plan to the closest exact option name in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Physical Health, which aligns to Primary Health Coverage -> physical_health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan; PrimeCare Premium Mental Health aligns to Primary Health Coverage -> mental_health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan; PrimeHome Premium Coverage matches Property Protection -> home_content -> PrimeHome Premium Coverage; PrimeTravel Premium Plan matches Mobility Coverage -> travel_insurance -> PrimeTravel Premium Plan. Additional services include Premium Insurance Membership (matches General Services -> Premium Insurance Membership), Premium Medical Network (matches Travel Enhancement Services -> Premium Medical Network), 24/7 Travel Assistance (matches Travel Enhancement Services -> 24/7 Travel Assistance), and Business Travel Support (matches Travel Enhancement Services -> Business Travel Support).
